title: Retro Black & White
description: This resource pack changes all textures and makes them black and white.
body:
## 📖 What's this Resource pack
  This Resource pack changes the textures of the game to Black and White.That is, in the game you will see everything in black and white like in old movies.![A screenshot from the game.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce71aad960fbffecf35ea63f65c692a394c11340_0.webp)
    Now this Resource pack changes textures: 
1. Mobs 
2. Item
3. Text
3. Particles 
4. Blocks 
5. Entities
6. Light
6. You!
## What is this Resource Pack for?
- It can be useful to complicate the game, because you will not be able to define the colors.
- To record films about minecraft, as in the 30s.
- And just hanging out with friends.
## ⚙️How do I add a resource pack to the game?
1.Download this resource Pack.

2.Open the .minecraft
folder.

3. In it, open the resourcepack folder.
4. And move th  Retro Black & White to this folder.
## ⚙️Activation in the game. 
- Go to settings, then resource sets and activate Retro Black & White.
